task_completion.description: Verify the first Observation log has the correct date and notes for Week 1.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an Observation log entry or form with the date 'May 19, 2025'. The notes field should contain text mentioning 'Week 1: Corn at V3 stage' and '32,000 plants per acre'.

task_completion.description: Verify the first Observation log has the correct quantity and label.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Within the May 19 log, look for a Quantity entry with the value '12' (inches) and the label 'plant height'.

task_completion.description: Verify the second Observation log has the correct date and notes for Week 2.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an Observation log entry or form with the date 'May 26, 2025'. The notes field should contain text mentioning 'Week 2: Corn at V6 stage' and 'flea beetle'.

task_completion.description: Verify the second Observation log has the correct quantity and label.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Within the May 26 log, look for a Quantity entry with the value '24' (inches) and the label 'plant height'.

task_completion.description: Verify the third Observation log has the correct date and notes for Week 3.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an Observation log entry or form with the date 'June 2, 2025'. The notes field should contain text mentioning 'Week 3: Corn at V9 stage' and 'Tassel initiation'.

task_completion.description: Verify the third Observation log has the correct quantity and label.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Within the June 2 log, look for a Quantity entry with the value '38' (inches) and the label 'plant height'.

task_completion.description: Verify all three Observation logs are successfully created and visible in the logs list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the main logs list or overview screen in farmOS Field Kit. You should see exactly three Observation logs listed corresponding to the dates May 19, May 26, and June 2, 2025.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the farmOS Field Kit graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the farmOS Field Kit web or app interface being used, with form fields being filled out, rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the actual farmOS application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface shown must be farmOS Field Kit, not a generic text editor, spreadsheet, or mock-up.

integrity.description: Verify the logs were genuinely entered into the system.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for evidence of form submission, such as save buttons being clicked or the logs appearing in the application's saved logs list, rather than just text typed into an unsaved form.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating exactly 3 'Observation' logs in farmOS Field Kit. Log 1: Date May 19, 2025; Notes must mention 'V3 stage' and '32,000 plants per acre'; Quantity: 12 inches (plant height). Log 2: Date May 26, 2025; Notes must mention 'V6 stage' and 'flea beetle'; Quantity: 24 inches (plant height). Log 3: Date June 2, 2025; Notes must mention 'V9 stage' and 'Tassel initiation'; Quantity: 38 inches (plant height). All agricultural data provided is accurate to real-world corn production practices.
